extensions.author: RobDevice
extensions.description: Driver extension for the VSDinside/HOTSPOTEK N4.
extensions.name: VSDinside N4 Driver
extensions.release_notes: Adds boot splash device settings and upload support for the VSDinside/HOTSPOTEK N4.
extensions.review_notes: Packaged as a normal driver extension and intended to be installed through the Extensions tab.

extensions.author: RobDevice
extensions.description: MSFS 2020 SimVars and Key Events through SimConnect.
extensions.name: MSFS SimConnect
extensions.release_notes: Adds standard MSFS 2020 SimVars as inputs, Key Events and writable SimVars as actions, a configurable SimConnect TCP address, and the Linux x86_64 SimConnect helper.
extensions.review_notes: Uses standard SimConnect only; aircraft-specific L:Vars, H: events, and dynamic Input Events are out of scope for this release.
